caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt, is positioned in the lower right corner of a digital screen capture. He is sitting in a room with a dark background and a white wall behind him. To his left, a large overlay displays a print settings menu with "Destination" and "Copies" options, alongside a list of names and cities, including "Carl Hagedorn NEW YORK KNICKS" and "Michael Loguerno ORLANDO MAGIC." A chat window is visible on the right side of the screen, showing messages from "glowbog27" saying "turning" and "Nightbot" stating, "Click the link for the BREAKS, SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://bit.ly/NzS6ekX9". At the bottom, a red and white banner reads "JASEY'S CASEBREAKS.COM". Throughout the sequence, the man looks toward the camera and speaks, while the print menu window flickers and changes its content.
